_rule: No default content defined; do not invent labels, icons, or copy. Use only what is in the spec or leave slots empty.
_behavior: Overflow is driven by container/browser width. When overflowMode is 'auto', tabs that do not fit move to the More dropdown. When overflowMode is 'none', horizontal scrolling may occur. Do not rely on prose only for viewport/width behavior.
_responsive: Tab strip layout and overflow (tabs vs More dropdown) depend on available width; no fixed breakpoints—behavior is container-driven.
